meta.title: Donate – Back to Meaning Maximization
meta.description: Support Back to Meaning Maximization with your donation. Every contribution helps us build a more just economy.

spendendstand.beschreibung: The funds we collect help us build the digital infrastructure and support founding members during the startup phase. We use every euro transparently and comprehensibly.

warum.transparenz_text: Every cent is documented. You see exactly where your donation is used.
warum.wirkung_text: Your donation directly contributes to building a more just economy.
warum.gemeinschaft_text: You become part of a movement that rethinks economics together.

form.beschreibung: Choose an amount or enter your own. All donations are processed securely via Stripe.
form.hinweis: Your donation is secure and tax-deductible.
